prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 2023 International Conference on Climate Resilient Pakistan, frequently known as the 2023 Geneva conference, constituted a single-day global gathering focused on providing assistance to the Government of Pakistan following the catastrophic floods that occurred in 2022. This conference was jointly organized by the Pakistani Government and the United Nations, and it took place on January 9, 2023, in Geneva, Switzerland. The proceedings of this one-day event were initiated by Shehbaz Sharif, who holds the position of Prime Minister of Pakistan, and Antonio Guterres, the Secretary-General of the United Nations. The attendance comprised over 450 participants, which included private benefactors, international financial entities, and governmental delegates representing approximately 40 nations. During the conference, Pakistan introduced its comprehensive "Resilient, Recovery, Rehabilitation, and Reconstruction Framework" (4RF) and sought international backing and enduring collaborations to facilitate its successful execution. The 4RF document outlines both the financial mechanisms and the organizational structures necessary for its implementation in a manner that is open and transparent.
B. 2023 International Conference on Climate Resilient Pakistan, more commonly referred to as 2023 Geneva conference, was a one-day international conference on aid to Pakistani Government after the devastating floods in 2022. The conference was co-hosted by the Pakistani Government and the United Nations, held on 9 January 2023 in Geneva, Switzerland. Shehbaz Sharif, the Prime Minister of Pakistan, and Antonio Guterres, the Secretary-General of the United Nations, began the one-day conference, the more than 450 attendees including private donors, international financial organizations, and government representatives from around 40 countries.In the conference, Pakistan presented the “Resilient, Recovery, Rehabilitation, and Reconstruction Framework” (4RF) and seek international support and long-term partnerships for its implementation. The 4RF document covers the funding mechanism and institutional arrangements for its execution in an open, transparent,
C. The 2023 Geneva conference was a one-day international conference on aid to the Pakistani Government following the devastating floods in 2022, organized by the Pakistani Government and the United Nations. The conference was opened by Shehbaz Sharif and Antonio Guterres and over 450 people from around 40 countries, including private donors, international financial organizations, and government representatives. Pakistan presented the "Resilient, Recovery, Rehabilitation, and Reconstruction Framework" (4RF) and sought international support and long-term partnerships. The 4RF document, organized by Pakistan, in an openly transparent manner.

Answer:
